mapper.sql: template_id, template_type, user_id, rule_name, rule_content, update_by, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT tri.template_id, tri.template_type, tri.user_id, tri.rule_name, tri.rule_content, tri.update_by, tri.create_time, tri.update_time FROM template_rule_info tri INNER JOIN resource_template_relation rtr ON tri.template_id = rtr.template_id WHERE rtr.resource_id = #{resourceId} AND tri.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tri.create_time DESC

SELECT resource_id, memory_rule_id FROM resource_template_relation WHERE resource_id IN
#{resourceId}
